seoTitle: Nungatta vs Nungatta South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nungatta and Nungatta South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nungatta vs Nungatta South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nungatta and Nungatta South.
heading: Nungatta vs Nungatta South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nungatta, New South Wales and Nungatta South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nungatta has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Nungatta South (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nungatta or Nungatta South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nungatta has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Nungatta South scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nungatta scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Nungatta South scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nungatta or Nungatta South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nungatta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
